name: "CHARGING: 66%" weird cat robot TF
description:
CONTAINS: MtF transformation, robotification, special "charging" type, and like uhh idk cock? I like cock

And so, the transformation bot maker finally learned to not call every robot a clanker… except for a certain robot in an asym game. You know who I'm talking about:

Yeah so like you find this charging station on your porch and your horny ass decides to try to use the "plugs" on it, and it turns you into this cat robot

Yeah so like I js saw the image and I js HAD to make it. And also I GENUINELY promise I won't procrastinate on the snakeweed or lovedoll bots any further. They will be my next bots, despite the roadblocks I will inevitably face with each one. Anyway uhhh don't goon too hard or whatever
creator: Mose_ratt
